source: Yeah, it's like that, y'know, the student's awareness of their responsibility is very lacking nowadays. Most of them are irresponsible with their obligations

source: This uduk rice is on Rajiman street and opens from afternoon to night. The menu is pretty simple. ony rice and other side dishes. Usually I eat uduk rice with fried chicken and sambal, which isn't too spicy.

source: Anyway, my first Indomie in 2018 last night turned out to be delightful.

source: While waiting for the year to change, we tried coming here. Both of us ordered a few sushis. The drinks were milktea and vanilla ice cream with coconut. The sushi was good but I think it had too much rice. Still tasty, though. The cost was affordable.
target: Paimahon parsirangan ni taon ta coba ma tu son. Hita nadua tatuhor akka sushi. Siinumon milktea dohot eskrim vanilla dohot dasar ni kalapa. Molo sushi na lumayan do alai songon na magodanghu indahan na. Alai dai na tabo. Arga na pe mura do.

source: Not to mention they haven't processed my complaint yet. I don't think I'll get my money back, even though my credits and quota are gone.

source: The most disappointing is when the leader cannot and will not differentiate nor care about which one is the real statesman and which one is the dirty politician

source: This is a recommended chicken porridge place near Bandung. The location is strategic and easy to find, the price don't make you go broke, and the place is always packed, weekdays or weekends, because the flavour's just that good.
target: Bubur manuk na tarhilala sipabotohonon di humaliang bandung, ingananna bagak mura di lului, argana pe dang pasudaahon kattung, ingananna torus godang  ro diebati jolma ganup ari karejo nang pe ujungni minggu alani daina na tabo.

source: Going to this place to rest after dealing with traffic jam. The food was okay but the cakes were awesome. Totally worth it
target: Mangebati inganan on laho maradian dung loja macet dipardalanan, sipanganon oke, alai kue-kuena mantap, gabe targagarhon.

source: Then what's the point of me updating my newest cellphone number to the BNI Branch Customer Service if the data in BNI will still show my old number? What's with this service!

source: I've been coming to enjoy the food in Roemah Nenek more times than I could remember. I love the comfortable atmosphere for dining with family. On certain days, there's even live music. The food also has a lot of variations, from the traditional, Asian, and even Western food.
target: Au nungnga mansai jotjot mandai sipanganon di jabu ni oppung. Lomo do rohakku  ditingki i na sonang laho rap mangan dohot akka keluarga. Ditikki ari tartontu adong do live musik na. Sipanganonnna pe godang sipillitonna masmassam sian na tradisional, asia, sahat tu sipanganon ni barat.

source: A lot of people don't really like going to the doctor. Aside from the relatively expensive price for some people, not every doctor could heal you. A lot of them often give false diagnosis. I don't know if it's a big deal or not, the doctors are humans too, after all.
target: Godang jolma na hurang lomo rohana laho marubat tu dokter. Asing ni hepeng na agak arga tu deba jolma, laho tu dokter dang salelengna pamalumhon. Godang dokter na sala pamaresoon. Porlu do manang nungga somal, dokter pe jolma do.

source: Good service, large enough parking lot, the strawberry grove is vast and has a lot of red strawberries that's ripe for picking. The resto's food has a lot of variety, tastes great, the strawberry sambal is especially unique and tasty. Nasi liwet with strawberry is a must-try. So far, none of the meals have been disappointing. Highly recommended for family travels.
target: Pangurupionna denggan, inganan parkir na pe tuk labbas, kobun stroberi labbas dohot godang straoberi naung agak merah lao diputik.
